summary: Replace LookupHash-then-RecordHash with ReserveHash/ConfirmHash/ReleaseHash reservation pattern in invoice ingest to close the parallel-duplicate-content race.
reason: Parallel goroutines processing files with identical SHA256 all saw the hash missing, all POSTed to /expenses, all received distinct expense_ids; only the last RecordHash won and the earlier uploads became ghost expenses no future hash gate could catch. Reservation pattern claims the slot atomically (INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + RowsAffected) before upload; failed uploads release the sentinel; successful uploads confirm with the real expense_id. Filed per Greptile P1.
validated_outcome: TestReserveHash_ParallelDuplicateClaimsExactlyOne spawns 20 goroutines on the same hash; exactly one claims.
